holdings.infoBox: DSTX is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Microelectronics stock at 2.61%, America Movil SAB de CV Ordinary Shares - Class B at 2.04%, British American Tobacco PLC ADR at 1.95%, Sanofi at 1.91%, and Kia Corporation at 1.63%.

overview.description: The Distillate International Fundamental Stability & Value ETF (DSTX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects global ex-US, large- and mid-cap stocks that score favourably for financial indebtedness, fundamental stability, and valuation. DSTX was launched on Dec 14, 2020 and is issued by Distillate.
